chat.messages.transform.wired_in: crates/ava-agent/src/agent_loop/mod.rs — apply_messages_transform() helper called in generate_turn_streaming() before passing messages to the LLM
chat.messages.transform.behavior: Chain pattern: each plugin receives output of previous. Messages lacking 'role' field are discarded. Original message structure preserved for index-matched messages.

session.compacting.behavior: Returns (extra_context, custom_prompt). Extra context strings injected as System messages before compaction. First non-empty custom_prompt wins (currently logged but compaction uses default — hook infrastructure complete).

chat.message.wired_in: crates/ava-agent/src/agent_loop/mod.rs — run_unified() after the goal message is added to context, before the main loop

text.complete.wired_in: crates/ava-agent/src/agent_loop/mod.rs — generate_turn_streaming() after stream loop completes, before tool call finalization

command.execute.before.wired_in: crates/ava-tui/src/app/commands.rs — handle_slash_command() at the top, before the match arm dispatch. Uses tokio::task::block_in_place to bridge sync/async. Only fires when AgentStack is initialized (graceful degradation).
command.execute.before.behavior: First plugin returning {block: true} wins. Returns error message to user with reason. No block = command executes normally.
